title: JuvenileJusticeStatistics
description: An AGGREGATE youth & family justice measure for a reporting period — detention admissions by community district, detention and placement demographics, incident reports, pre-placement figures, and annual child-abuse-allegation detention/placement counts. Published only in aggregate; no individual youth in detention or placement is ever exposed. Canonical schema reconciling 'Detention Admissions by Community District' (2hrw-qfsu, 4 columns), 'Detention and Placement Demographic reports' (bhs9-p657), 'Detention and Placement Incident Reports' (2jnq-tef6), 'Annual Child Abuse Allegation Detention and Placement' (kkjw-ny95), and 'Report to City Council on Preplacement' (iwat-y983, 9 columns).

metric.description: Which youth-justice measure this row reports.

value.description: The aggregate count for the metric where not a named field.

ageBands.description: Age-band breakdown carried by the pre-placement report (iwat-y983).
